message_text: The client presentation has been moved to 2pm today — please update your slides before then.
Hi team, just a reminder that timesheets are due by end of day Friday as usual.
We've noticed unusual login activity on your account. Please reset your password immediately.
The new coffee machine has been installed in the second-floor kitchen.
Could you review the attached budget proposal when you get a chance? No rush, but ideally before next Wednesday.
Payroll will be processed one day early this month due to the bank holiday.
The fire alarm test scheduled for Thursday has been postponed to the following week.
Hi, the printer on floor 3 is out of toner again. Could someone log a facilities request?
Please confirm your attendance for the quarterly review by replying to this email today.
Gentle reminder: your annual compliance training expires in 48 hours. Please complete it to avoid access restrictions.
We're trialling a new project management tool next month — more details to follow.
The heating in Building B will be turned off briefly tomorrow morning for maintenance.
Could you send over the finalised invoice for the Henderson project? The client's payment terms start from receipt.
Apologies for the short notice — the supplier needs the signed purchase order returned by close of business today.
Team lunch is booked for next Friday at 12:30. Let me know of any dietary requirements.
Just flagging that the shared drive migration completed successfully over the weekend. All files should be accessible.
Hi, would you mind updating the contact list with the new starters' details when you have a moment?
The board has approved the revised travel policy. You can find the updated version on the intranet.
We need to resolve the discrepancy in last month's expense report before finance closes the books on Wednesday.
Your desk phone extension has been changed to 4417. No action needed on your end.
Please be aware that the car park will be resurfaced next week. Alternative parking arrangements are detailed below.
The server is showing critical memory usage. Can someone from infrastructure take a look as soon as possible?
Hi all, attached is the agenda for Monday's team meeting. Feel free to suggest additions.
Would you be able to cover the reception desk between 1 and 2 tomorrow? Sarah is at an appointment.
A delivery arrived for your department. It's been left in the loading bay and needs collecting before 4pm.
Congratulations to the sales team on exceeding their Q3 target by 12%.
The Wi-Fi password for the guest network has been updated. New credentials are posted in each meeting room.
Hi, the client just called — they haven't received the proposal we sent on Friday. Can you re-send it now?
Your probation review is scheduled for next Thursday at 10am. Please prepare a short summary of your first three months.
Reminder: all holiday requests for December must be submitted by the end of this month.
The vending machine on the ground floor is being replaced. It should be back in service by Wednesday.
We've been asked to provide an updated risk register to the auditors by Friday morning. Can you check sections 4 and 5?
Please ensure your laptop is connected to the network tonight so the security patch can be applied overnight.
Just letting you know that the intern cohort starts on the 14th. Onboarding packs have already been prepared.
Could you chase the catering company? We still don't have confirmation for the event on the 20th and it's in five days.
The CEO will be visiting the office next Tuesday. Please keep common areas tidy.
A water leak has been reported in the ground-floor corridor. Facilities are on their way but please avoid that area.
Hi, the document you sent has tracked changes still visible. Could you accept all changes and resend a clean version?
Thanks for sorting the workshop materials — everything looked great on the day.
Your building access card will stop working at midnight unless you complete the annual security declaration.
Hi, I noticed the project timeline doesn't account for the bank holiday. Worth adjusting before we share it externally.
The charity bake sale raised £312 last week. Thanks to everyone who contributed.
Heads up — two of the interview candidates for tomorrow have requested virtual links instead of attending in person.
Please remember to lock your screens when stepping away from your desks.
The data protection team needs all departments to complete the updated DPIA form by end of next week.
Our energy usage report for Q2 is now available on the sustainability page.
The API endpoint for the payments service is returning 503 errors. This is affecting live transactions.
Could you double-check that the meeting room bookings for next week don't overlap? There was a conflict last time.
Morning — the external consultant cancelled today's 11am session. We're trying to rebook for Thursday.
Please send the signed NDA back to legal today. The partnership agreement cannot proceed without it.
The team's shared calendar has been updated with all the April deadlines.
Hi, a few of the test cases in the staging environment are failing after last night's deployment. Can you investigate before we push to production?
Friendly reminder to submit your peer feedback forms. They're helpful for the review cycle but not mandatory.
The office plants are being watered on Tuesdays now instead of Mondays.
We need someone to take minutes at the governance meeting on Thursday. Any volunteers?
Hi, the insurance renewal documents need a second signatory. Could you review and countersign by tomorrow?
The recruitment agency has sent through five CVs for the analyst role. I've forwarded them to you for shortlisting.
New recycling bins have been placed next to each printer station.
Can you update the client contact spreadsheet? A couple of the phone numbers are out of date.
Please note that the staff survey results will be shared in next week's all-hands meeting.
The landlord has requested a response to the lease amendment by close of play tomorrow.
Hi, just wanted to flag that the quarterly health and safety walkthrough is due. Could you schedule it in?
We've updated the style guide for external communications. The changes are mostly minor formatting tweaks.
The training session on inclusive hiring practices is next Wednesday at 2pm. Registration is open on the HR portal.
